steps.t: Anlaf the Forlorn tends the bar of the Forsaken Inn, in the Lone-lands.
Anlaf told you that Umín just left the Forsaken Inn, and if you hurry you might see him outside somewhere.
Elrond is at the Haven of Orladion in Rivendell, north-west of the Last Homely House. You have cleansed the corruption from the Necklace of the Ordina…
